mapper.select: SELECT id, rule_name, description, category, input_pattern, output_template, priority, is_active, metadata_tags, test_cases, usage_count, success_rate, created_at, updated_at FROM regex_preprocessing_rules WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY priority DESC, created_at DESC

SELECT id, rule_name, description, category, input_pattern, output_template, priority, is_active, metadata_tags, test_cases, usage_count, success_rate, created_at, updated_at FROM regex_preprocessing_rules WHERE is_active = true AND category = #{category} ORDER BY priority DESC, created_at DESC

SELECT id, rule_name, description, category, input_pattern, output_template, priority, is_active, metadata_tags, test_cases, usage_count, success_rate, created_at, updated_at FROM regex_preprocessing_rules WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE regex_preprocessing_rules SET rule_name = #{ruleName}, description = #{description}, category = #{category}, input_pattern = #{inputPattern}, output_template = #{outputTemplate}, priority = #{priority}, is_active = #{isActive}, metadata_tags = #{metadataTags, typeHandler=com.moneyshift.api.config.JsonTypeHandler}, test_cases = #{testCases, typeHandler=com.moneyshift.api.config.TestCaseListTypeHandler}, success_rate = #{successRate}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE regex_preprocessing_rules SET usage_count = #{usageCount}, success_rate = #{successRate}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, category_name, description, color_code, is_active, created_at FROM regex_preprocessing_categories WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY category_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO regex_preprocessing_categories (category_name, description, color_code, is_active) VALUES (#{categoryName}, #{description}, #{colorCode}, #{isActive})
